channel.title: Awards on Vandana Verma
channel.description: Recent content in Awards on Vandana Verma

item.title: Top 50 Women Leaders in Cybersecurity to Watch in 2026
item.description: Recognized by The Cyber Express in its 2026 list of women leaders in cybersecurity to watch.

item.title: One of the Top 100 Cyber Security Influencers
item.description:
The goal was to choose a set of CISOs and InfoSec leaders who have demonstrated an extraordinary leadership and resilience during the challenging times


**Reference** https://www.uniindia.com/cyberfrat-makes-an-history-with-cf100-india-2024-45-honouring-the-top-100-cybersecurity-influencers/pnn/news/3261320.html

item.title: The Cyber Express - Top 100 Women in Cybersecurity
item.description:
The Cyber Express - Top 100 Women in Cybersecurity


**Reference**

https://thecyberexpress.com/top-100-women-in-cybersecurity-leading-charge/

item.title: Aspiring CXO Award 2024
Winner - Cyber Security Leader of the Year Award 2023
Risky Women - Women to Watch
item.description: Named as a “Woman to Watch” by Risky Women, a global network connecting, celebrating and championing women in Risk, Regulation and Compliance since 2014.

item.title: IFSEC Global Influencers in Security 2022
item.description: Recognized in IFSEC Global’s 2022 Influencers in Security list.

item.title: 40 under 40 in Cybersecurity 2022
item.description: Named in the 40 under 40 in Cybersecurity list for 2022, recognizing emerging leaders making significant contributions to the cybersecurity field.

item.title: People Choice Award - Inteligenca
item.description:
Part of Ally of the Year Award, Humbled and honoured to receive the award - People choice Award

Reference

item.title: Indian Achievers' Award - Community Enablement
item.description: Recognized for community enablement in cybersecurity through InfosecGirls, WoSec, and OWASP.

item.title: Redgate 100 - Most Influential in the Database Community 2022
item.description: Included in the Redgate 100 as one of the most influential voices in the database community.

item.title: EWF Women of Influence Awards 2021 - Public Sector & Academic
item.description: Recipient of the 2021 Executive Women’s Forum Women of Influence Award in the Public Sector & Academic category.

item.title: IFSEC Global Influencers in Security and Fire 2021
item.description: Recognized in IFSEC Global’s 2021 Influencers in Security and Fire list.

item.title: Top 25 Women Leaders in Cybersecurity 2021
item.description: Recognized as one of the Top 25 Women Leaders in Cybersecurity for 2021, highlighting leadership and contributions to the global cybersecurity community.

item.title: 7th Annual DynamicCISO Excellence Award Resilient CISO
item.description:
The goal was to choose a set of CISOs and InfoSec leaders who have demonstrated an extraordinary leadership and resilience during the challenging times

Reference

www.cisosummit.co.in

item.title: CQ 100: Meet The Dynamic Women Changing The Face Of Indian Cyberspace
item.description:
CQ100: Meet The Dynamic Women Changing The Face Of Indian Cyberspace

Reference

https://www.the420.in/meet-the-dynamic-women-changing-the-face-of-indian-cyberspace/

item.title: Initiative Star Contributor Award - Issued by IBM
item.description:
Initiative Star Contributor Award - Issued by IBM

Member or non-member of the IBM Academy of Technology who has completed 3+ Academy Initiatives since January 1, 2020 and at least one must have been within the 12 months prior to the badge request, with a “Satisfactory” rating or better and participant rating of “Rock Star” or “Strong Participation” for those initiatives.

Reference

https://www.credly.com/badges/094e8416-b3d8-42e1-9d25-4faf199a81e5

item.title: AppSec Influencer of 2020 Award
item.description: Reference - WhiteSource https://twitter.com/WhiteSourceSoft/status/1345009431252242432?s=20

item.title: Most Recognized Women in Cybersecurity — CXO Junction
item.description:
Featured in CXO Junction’s list of the Most Influential and Most Recognized Women in India’s Cybersecurity industry.

Reference
https://cxojunction.com/the-most-influential-women-in-india-cybersecurity/

item.title: SC Media - Women in IT Security - Advocates Award - 2020
item.description:
SC Media, Women in IT Security Advocates Award

Reference

https://www.scmagazine.com/women-in-it-security/women-advocates/vandana-verma-broadening-the-diversity-aperture/

item.title: Winner - Cyber Security Woman of the Year Award 2020
item.description:
Reference

https://cybersecurityawards.com/2020-winners

item.title: Top 100 Women in Cybersecurity 2020 — Technology Magazine
item.description:
Featured in Technology Magazine’s list of the Top 100 Women in Cybersecurity for 2020.

Reference
https://technologymagazine.com/cloud-and-cybersecurity/top-100-women-cybersecurity-2020

item.title: 27 Influential Penetration Testers’ around the world
item.description: Reference

item.title: Top 100 Women in Cybersecurity 2020 — Cyber Defense Awards
item.description:
Named in the Cyber Defense Awards Top 100 Women in Cybersecurity for 2020, announced at Black Hat USA 2020.

Reference
https://cyberdefenseawards.com/top-100-women-in-cybersecurity-for-2020/

item.title: Top 10 Influential Indian Women in Cybersecurity
item.description: Recognised as one of the Top 10 Influential Indian Women in Cybersecurity for contributions to application security, community building through InfosecGirls and WoSec, and leadership on the OWASP Global Board.

item.title: 16 Women Paving the Way in AppSec
item.description:
Glad to be on the list. Each of the women listed here plays an integral role in the development and progress of application security in their respective organizations. With a wide variety of backgrounds, specialties, and roles, these women are used to pushing boundaries to achieve more.

Check out these 16 inspiring women paving the way in AppSec, and follow them on Twitter to stay on top of their news and events.

item.title: 247 Women in Cybersecurity to Follow — Cybersecurity Ventures
item.description:
Named in the Cybersecurity Ventures list of 247 Women in Cybersecurity to Follow on Twitter, recognising contributions to the cybersecurity community, diversity initiatives, and thought leadership.

Reference
https://cybersecurityventures.com/women-in-cybersecurity/

item.title: Top Women in Cybersecurity in India — Instasafe
item.description:
Listed as one of the top women leaders in the field of technology and cybersecurity in India by Instasafe.

Reference
https://instasafe.com/top-women-in-cybersecurity-in-india/

item.title: 52 Influential Cyber Security Bloggers and Speakers by Peerlyst
item.description:
Glad to be on the list.

Reference - https://www.peerlyst.com/posts/peerlyst-community-ebook-52-influential-cyber-security-bloggers-and-speakers-peerlyst

item.title: Winner - Cyber Security Woman Supporter of the Year Award 2019 - Woman CyberJutsu
item.description:
Cyber Security Woman Supporter of the Year Award 2019 - Woman CyberJutsu, 2019 in “Secure Coder” Category

Reference

https://womenscyberjutsu.org/page/AWARDWinners

item.title: IFSEC Global Influencers in Security and Fire 2019
item.description: Recognized in IFSEC Global’s 2019 Influencers in Security and Fire list.

item.title: Manager Choice Award - IBM
item.description:
Manager’s Choice Award for demonstrating the Unite to get it done now

Reference

https://leadmind.inteligenca.com/cswy2020/

item.title: Winja CTF Winner — Nullcon 2015
item.description:
Won first prize at the inaugural Winja CTF at Nullcon Goa 2015, solving the maximum number of security challenges in the given time. Winja CTF is a Capture The Flag event aimed at spreading awareness of information security among women.

Reference
https://infosecgirls.in/blog/2015/03/18/2015-03-18-winja-ctf-for-women-at-nullcon-2015/
